name: Steve Schulkens
headline: Award-winning TV producer, PR executive, and native New Orleanian
longBio: Steve Schulkens is an award-winning TV producer and PR executive, and a native New Orleanian. He is a former TV/radio news reporter whose career has spanned decades in the media industry. He appeared on the show in Episode 15, '9 Lives.'

name: Ashley Morrison
headline: Paramedic with West Jefferson EMS
longBio: Ashley Morrison has served as a paramedic with West Jefferson EMS for 16 years.

name: Shawn Oddo
headline: Owner of Valhalla Training Grounds and competitive bodybuilder
longBio: Shawn Oddo is the owner of Valhalla Training Grounds and a competitive bodybuilder.

name: Jon McCarthy
headline: Veteran paramedic, published author, comic creator
longBio: Jon McCarthy is a veteran paramedic and the published author of 'Hard Roll.' He is also a comic creator.

name: Jourdan Blue
headline: Musician and 2021 American Idol contestant
longBio: Jourdan Blue is a musician and was a contestant on American Idol in 2021.

name: Dr. Ryan Estaris
headline: Physician, public speaker, ADHD advocate
longBio: Dr. Ryan Estaris is a physician and public speaker who lives with ADHD.

name: Jude Blued
headline: 50+ year radio broadcasting veteran and comedian
longBio: Jude Blued is a radio broadcasting veteran with over 50 years in the industry, and a comedian.

name: The Joker of New Orleans
headline: Street performer and mentalist
longBio: The Joker of New Orleans is a street performer and mentalist based in New Orleans.

name: Theophile Bourgeois IV
headline: Cajun Vista Fishing Lodge owner, filmmaker, tattoo artist, musician
longBio: Theophile Bourgeois IV owns Cajun Vista Fishing Lodge and is a filmmaker, tattoo artist, and musician.

name: Alexander Steven Reyes
headline: Comedian and philanthropist
longBio: Alexander Steven Reyes is a comedian and philanthropist.

name: Stale Kracker (Justin Chiasson)
headline: Social media personality, retired State Trooper, CEO of Cajun 2 Step
longBio: Justin Chiasson, known on social media as Stale Kracker, is a retired Louisiana State Trooper and the CEO of Cajun 2 Step.
